description_long: This clock tower features a rich, dark wooden structure with ornate decorative finials and turned columns, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The front face displays a circular clock with a white dial, black Roman numerals, and two black hands, set within a round bezel. Below the clock face, a pendulum is visible through a glass panel, adding to the traditional charm. The top of the tower is adorned with a series of domed and spired finials, while the base is supported by rounded feet and additional carved details. The sides and back are solid wood panels, with the sides showing the depth and thickness of the structure. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century European wall clocks, blending both functional and decorative elements.
description: A richly detailed, dark wooden clock tower with ornate finials, a round clock face with Roman numerals, and a visible pendulum. The structure is elegant and traditional, featuring classic carved details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate clock face with Roman numerals, visible pendulum, and decorative finials.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the wooden structure and the turned columns, with no clock face visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wooden panel with decorative finials on top, no clock face or pendulum visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the thickness and side columns of the tower.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular with a white background, black Roman numerals marking the hours, and two black hands for hours and minutes. The bezel is simple, and the face is protected by a glass cover. There are no additional decorative elements on the face itself.
